sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, converted_value Int16) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
INSERT INTO test_table (value, converted_value) VALUES ('123', toInt16OrDefault('123')), ('abc', toInt16OrDefault('abc'));
UPDATE test_table SET converted_value = toInt16OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'Int16')) WHERE value LIKE '%foo%';
SELECT toInt16OrDefault('32768', CAST('-1', 'Int16')) AS overflow_check, toInt16OrDefault('12.9', CAST('0', 'Int16')) AS decimal_check;
